notes: Re-run only E007 as E007A because risk_fraction has been abolished. Evaluate target maintenance margin candidates in ascending order: 150, 180, 200. Adopt the first candidate with maintenance_below_100_count == 0, maintenance_below_130_count == 0, and stop_triggered == false. Interpret min_maintenance_margin_pct and below counts as the assumed maintenance margin if each trade immediately reaches SL, not as post-entry margin.
